hero.label: Ihya Project
hero.title: Revive Your Quran… Word by Word
hero.subtitle: Specialized courses in Qira'at, Tajweed, and the etiquettes of Quran bearers

about.title: Who is the Sheikh?
about.name: Sheikh al-Muqri' Qusai bin Talal bin Abdullah Bawazir
about.bio_1: Professor of Arabic Language and Literature at Bursa Uludağ University, Turkey
about.bio_2: Master's and PhD in the Noble Quran and Qira'at
about.bio_3: Licensed and licensing in the Ten Minor and Major Qira'at from senior scholars of the Islamic world
about.bio_4: Reciter of the Ten Minor and Major Qira'at for over thirteen years
about.bio_5: Served as teacher, supervisor, mentor, and director for numerous Quranic centers and institutes in Yemen and Turkey

values.title: Why Ihya?
values.value_1_desc: Built on the foundations of transmitted Islamic knowledge through verified chains
values.value_2_desc: Personal follow-up and continuous evaluation of student progress
values.value_3_desc: A faith-based atmosphere combining knowledge, practice, and spiritual growth

cta.ayah: And recite the Quran with measured recitation
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of learners on the journey of reviving the Quran

sample_courses.course_1_desc: A comprehensive explanation of the Tuhfat al-Atfal text on fundamental Tajweed rules with practical application
sample_courses.course_2_desc: An introduction to the science of Quranic readings, its foundations, and its imams with a study of differences between narrations
sample_courses.course_3_title: Summarized al-Tibyan on Quran Bearers' Etiquettes
sample_courses.course_3_desc: A study of the etiquettes of reciting, memorizing, and teaching the Noble Quran as outlined by Imam al-Nawawi
